headline: Citi Stock Falls. Bank Lifts Key Financial Target as Investor Day Gets Underway.
summary: Citigroup  boosted a key profitability target on Thursday, a move that was widely expected as the bank’s investor day event was getting underway at its New York headquarters.  Shares were down 3% in premarket trading, however, as investors appeared underwhelmed by the figures.  Citi said it would target return on tangible common equity, or RoTCE, between 11% and 13%, excluding the financial impact of its Banamex stake sale, for next year and 2028.

raw.headline: Citi Stock Falls. Bank Lifts Key Financial Target as Investor Day Gets Underway.
raw.summary: Citigroup  boosted a key profitability target on Thursday, a move that was widely expected as the bank’s investor day event was getting underway at its New York headquarters.  Shares were down 3% in premarket trading, however, as investors appeared underwhelmed by the figures.  Citi said it would target return on tangible common equity, or RoTCE, between 11% and 13%, excluding the financial impact of its Banamex stake sale, for next year and 2028.
